requirement_topic.en: Solomon Power Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz and Island Power Systems
requirement_topic.zh: Solomon Power并网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及岛屿电力系统
requirement_topic.zht: Solomon Power併網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及島嶼電力系統

summary.en: Solomon Islands uses 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Solomon Power, legally the Solomon Islands Electricity Authority (SIEA), is the national electricity utility and the practical gatekeeper for grid-connected charger projects. EV charger projects should confirm supply capacity, service connection, earthing, protection coordination, load management, metering, harmonics, commissioning, and any site-specific requirements with Solomon Power or the relevant project power-system owner before shipment.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供电。Solomon Power的法定名称为Solomon Islands Electricity Authority（SIEA），是国家电力公用事业单位，也是并网充电桩项目的实务把关方。电动汽车充电桩项目在出货前应与Solomon Power或相关项目供电系统业主确认供电容量、接入、接地、保护配合、负载管理、计量、谐波、调试及场站特定要求。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供電。Solomon Power的法定名稱為Solomon Islands Electricity Authority（SIEA），是國家電力公用事業單位，也是併網充電樁項目的實務把關方。電動汽車充電樁項目在出貨前應與Solomon Power或相關項目供電系統業主確認供電容量、接入、接地、保護配合、負載管理、計量、諧波、調試及場站特定要求。

standards_or_laws: Solomon Power / Solomon Islands Electricity Authority (SIEA) connection and service requirements
Solomon Islands 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply practice
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Project-specific solar, hydro, microgrid, or off-grid power-system requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger designs are commonly based on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply with local grid-operator acceptance. Solomon Islands has the same 50 Hz frequency but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage, so China domestic 220/380 V markings or type tests are not enough without input-range, protection, and thermal confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩设计通常基于220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电，并按当地电网运营商验收。所罗门群岛频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压为不同的230/400 V，因此仅有中国国内220/380 V标识或型式试验不足以证明适用，仍需确认输入范围、保护和热设计。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁設計通常基於220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電，並按當地電網運營商驗收。索羅門群島頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓為不同的230/400 V，因此僅有中國國內220/380 V標識或型式試驗不足以證明適用，仍需確認輸入範圍、保護和熱設計。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Confirm the charger covers 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase operation at 50 Hz, with protection settings and derating for hot, humid, coastal, weak-grid, solar-hybrid, and island logistics conditions. Do not state that Solomon Islands voltage matches China: the frequency matches, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
gap.zh: 须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相和400 V三相、50 Hz运行，并针对炎热、潮湿、沿海、弱电网、光伏混合供电和岛屿物流条件配置保护设定及降额设计。不得声称所罗门群岛电压与中国相同：两者频率相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
gap.zht: 須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相和400 V三相、50 Hz運行，並針對炎熱、潮濕、沿海、弱電網、光伏混合供電和島嶼物流條件配置保護設定及降額設計。不得聲稱索羅門群島電壓與中國相同：兩者頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory — connection approval and site power-system acceptance must be confirmed with Solomon Power / SIEA or the relevant microgrid, solar, hydro, or off-grid owner
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid acceptance is not a Solomon Power / SIEA or project power-system approval substitute

source.publisher: Solomon Power — Solomon Islands Electricity Authority (SIEA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Solomon Islands-ready charger package must prove 230/400 V, 50 Hz operation and site-specific connection suitability. China 220/380 V evidence may support review, but it does not remove the voltage, protection, derating, and project-acceptance gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向所罗门群岛的充电桩资料包必须证明230/400 V、50 Hz运行能力及场站接入适用性。中国220/380 V证据可支持审查，但不能消除电压、保护、降额和项目验收差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向索羅門群島的充電樁資料包必須證明230/400 V、50 Hz運行能力及場站接入適用性。中國220/380 V證據可支持審查，但不能消除電壓、保護、降額和項目驗收差距。
